_meta.purpose: Canonical ground truth profile for AutoResearch test bank entry #1. Built from 5 source documents (1 LinkedIn profile + 4 role-targeted CVs) plus Socratic Q&A corrections. This is the 'answer key' — the complete, corrected career profile.
corrections_applied: Dates corrected across all roles (CVs had inconsistent/collapsed dates)
10 roles expanded from 4-5 collapsed entries across CVs
Role #6 (Crotale) was hidden from all CVs — added from Q&A
Roles #8-#10 were collapsed into single 'Present' entry across CVs
All roles confirmed as Pakistan Air Force (different postings/secondments)
China role confirmed as deputation, not separate employer
Coursera certificates extracted from 7 PDF files

employer_note: All 10 roles are PAF postings/secondments/deputations. China was a deputation. NUTECH and College of Aero Eng are secondments. This is a single continuous military career with rotational assignments — the classic military transition pattern.

description: Designed, developed, and qualified mission-critical aircraft subsystems; successfully integrated into operational fleet
Led indigenous development of Backup Mission Computer for JF-17 — 135+ systems produced and deployed, eliminating import dependency, saving USD 1.27M for PAF
Led design, planning, and upgrade of Pakistan's first legacy trainer aircraft with glass cockpit (Dynon + Garmin avionics), enhancing pilot training to align with advanced fighter platforms

Managed glass cockpit modification program: commercial negotiations, production handover, certification, and export logistics to 11 countries (Saudi Arabia, Turkey, Qatar, etc.), generating $11.6M revenue
Supported aircraft system integration, modification, and retrofit activities, ensuring configuration baselines
Implemented Configuration Management Database (CMDB) to track aircraft configuration changes, improving traceability and audit readiness
Led Agile program delivery of aircraft systems using iterative planning, incremental delivery, and stakeholder engagement
Developed novel ECCM (Electronic Counter-Countermeasures) algorithm for ground-based legacy radars
Enhanced clutter rejection and resistance to noise jamming
Successfully deployed algorithm on in-service MPDR radar systems
Governed requirements management, verification planning, and deployment schedules
Delivered flight-line maintenance and sustainment support for SAAB 2000 Erieye AEW&C fleet — fault isolation, real-time troubleshooting, and corrective action planning
Led maintenance planning and execution, spares planning, and depot coordination
Performed reliability analysis (MTBF/MTTR) and trend analysis to optimize staggered and preventive maintenance plans, improving mission availability and aircraft uptime
Managed incorporation of Airworthiness Directives and Service Bulletins
Supervised multidisciplinary team of 80 engineers and technicians using AMOS maintenance planning system
Operational readiness management, maintenance scheduling/staggering for fleet availability
Supported sustainment and mission readiness of C2-enabled AEW&C platforms
Systems Engineering Lead within the JF-17 international joint development program (Pakistan-China), applying Agile and hybrid delivery with structured change and configuration management governance
Executed testing and integration of avionics subsystems on the advanced aircraft design/integration rig at CADI

Led requirements and stakeholder analysis to translate PAF operational needs into technical specifications — developed and managed Acceptance Test Requirements (ATRs) and verification/test specifications
Worked within multi-national defense environment, supporting integration, validation, and acceptance of critical aircraft systems
Supported early solution shaping and requirements definition, aligning system architectures and delivery timelines
Acted as technical and program interface between PAF customer representatives and CADI program leadership
Transfer of Source Code training — received access to aircraft source code for indigenous capability development

description: Program coordination for JF-17 Thunder Block III development and production at PAC Kamra
Tracked milestones across avionics integration, weapons systems qualification, and airframe production
Coordinated between CADI (OEM designer), PAF manufacturing facilities, and field squadrons for weapons testing and operations feedback
Managed configuration control for indigenous systems (mission computer, EW suite, AESA radar integration)
Budget tracking, contractor deliverables, schedule risk management
Led risk mitigation plans, RAID logs, and EVM reporting

roles.platform: Crotale SHORAD (Short-Range Air Defense) — French SAM system for airfield defense
description: Senior Engineering Officer responsible for operational readiness of Crotale short-range air defense weapons system
Managed field deployments, maintenance operations, and weapons system availability for airfield defense
Led maintenance staggering and preventive maintenance planning for weapons system fleet
Resource management: personnel, equipment, spares, and ammunition logistics
Supervised multi-disciplinary maintenance teams in field conditions
Ensured operational readiness and mission availability of air defense assets
Real-time fault diagnosis and corrective action in operational/field environment
roles.cv_appearances: HIDDEN — not present in any CV
roles.hidden_reason: User didn't know where to place a field weapons posting among anchor career points. Classic military transition problem — rotational postings that don't fit neat civilian career narratives.

notable_projects.name: Indigenous Backup Mission Computer — JF-17 Thunder
notable_projects.description: Designed and developed mission-critical backup mission computer. 135+ systems produced and deployed on in-service fighter aircraft, eliminating import dependency and saving USD 1.27M for PAF.

notable_projects.name: Glass Cockpit Modernization — Trainer Aircraft
notable_projects.description: Led glass cockpit modernization program, integrating Dynon and Garmin avionics suites on trainer aircraft. Managed commercial negotiations, production handover, certification, and export logistics to 11 countries.
notable_projects.quantified_impact: Exported to 11 countries (Saudi Arabia, Turkey, Qatar, etc.), $11.6M revenue

notable_projects.name: Novel ECCM Algorithm for Ground Radars
notable_projects.description: Developed novel ECCM algorithm for ground-based legacy radars during MS research, enhancing clutter rejection and resistance to noise jamming. Successfully deployed on in-service MPDR radar systems.
notable_projects.quantified_impact: Deployed on operational MPDR radar systems

notable_projects.name: Enterprise Configuration Management Database (CMDB)
notable_projects.description: Architected and deployed enterprise CMDB for advanced aircraft undergoing simultaneous development and deployment. Enabled disciplined change control, improved maintenance turnaround times.

cv_framings._note: The same career reframed 4 ways — this is the hardest parser/Cloud-building case. Each CV emphasizes different skills from the SAME roles.

onboarding_lessons._note: What this profile teaches us about onboarding edge cases that production users will hit
onboarding_lessons.multi_cv_conflicts: 4 CVs had different dates and titles for same roles — conflict detection + user picker needed
onboarding_lessons.role_collapsing: 10 actual roles collapsed to 4-5 across CVs — role consolidation logic needed
onboarding_lessons.hidden_roles: Crotale posting hidden from all CVs — timeline gap detection needed
onboarding_lessons.military_rotations: Same employer (PAF), 10 different postings — 'same employer, different posting' grouping needed
onboarding_lessons.title_reframing: Same role gets 4 different titles across CVs — fuzzy title matching needed
onboarding_lessons.certificate_sources: Certs came as separate PDF files — certificate PDF extractor needed
onboarding_lessons.description_gaps: Some roles had no bullets in some CVs — Socratic gap-filling needed
